ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding program */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for eligibility */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the program */,
  "funding_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the funding in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding program this round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number (e.g., 1, 2, etc.) */,
  "applications_open" TEXT /* Date when applications for this round open */,
  "applications_close" TEXT /* Date when applications for this round close */,
  "notice_of_decision" TEXT /* Date when the notice of decision is expected to be released */,
  "review_process_description" TEXT /* Description of the review process */,
  "max_grant_amount" REAL /* Maximum grant amount for this round */,
  "eligibility_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for eligibility checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who submitted the application */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round this application belongs to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the project */,
  "requested_funding" REAL /* Amount of funding requested */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to uploaded supporting documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization affiliation */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation committee */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round this committee belongs to */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chair of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "members_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the committee */,
  "meeting_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of committee meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_committees_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_committees_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who submitted the review */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned by the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Final recommendation (e.g., fund, do not fund) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application for which the decision was made */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the decision (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding approved */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, reviewer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
